description: Karaite partnership agreement in a shop between Shelomo b. Aharon Miʿmār and three orphans left by the deceased community man Yeshuʿa Qayīm. Dated 28 Av 5430 AM (1670 CE). The partnership shares are split with 7 for Shelomo b. Aharon Miʿmār and 13 for the orphans.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
